message:
fix(web/sse): reject null bytes in Sse::last_event_id() per SSE spec

Sse::last_event_id() bypassed the null-byte check enforced by
SseEvent::id(), allowing U+0000 in event IDs contrary to the SSE
specification. Added the same guard and a regression test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
